name: Spaghetti Sauce (Olive Garden)
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can stewed tomatoes; cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in oil until pink color disappears.
2. Crumble with fork.
3. Stir in tomatoes, V-8 juice, Prego, soup mix, and grape jelly.
4. Cook, stirring often, for 15 to 20 minutes or until the jelly melts and the sauce is piping hot.
